case_title: ROBERT J. BOCKELMAN VS. JAMES T. WONG et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO JAMES T. WONG BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-09-2010 AT 1:30PM.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,032.00 FILED BY BOCKELMAN, ROBERT J. AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JAMES T. EASTSHORE CHARTER LINES FIGUERAS ENTERPRISES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-09-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF BOCKELMAN, ROBERT J. (AUTHORIZATION NOTE FROM PLAINTIFF (PERSON TO PICK-UP EXHIBITS, ROBERT FERRIS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-27-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JAMES T.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-09-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-09-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT EASTSHORE CHARTER LINES FIGUERAS ENTERPRISES, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-23-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT FIGUERAS ENTERPRISES, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-23-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT EASTSHORE CHARTER LINES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOCKELMAN, ROBERT J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EASTSHORE CHARTER LINES FIGUERAS ENTERPRISES, INC. $2,032.43 PRINCIPAL, $138.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,170.43, DEFENDANT JAMES T. WONG DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
